name: ADMIN_POLICY_SECRET
description: Secret Manager resource name for admin policy JSON (projects/.../secrets/.../versions/latest).
notes: 服务端直接读取 Secret Manager 资源名称；如未启用可留空。

name: ADS_OAUTH_REDIRECT_URL
description: Legacy single redirect URL for Google Ads OAuth fallback.
notes: 可选，推荐使用 ADS_OAUTH_REDIRECT_URLS；保留用于兼容。

name: ADS_OAUTH_REDIRECT_URLS
description: Comma separated list of allowed OAuth redirect URLs for Google Ads.

name: AUTH_URL
description: Public authentication redirect base URL (preview).

name: DATABASE_URL
description: Primary PostgreSQL connection string for backend services (internal network address).

name: DOMAIN
description: Primary production domain for customer-facing URLs (e.g. autoads.dev).
notes: Production 环境使用 DOMAIN，与 preview 的 NEXT_PUBLIC_DOMAIN 区分。

name: GEMINI_API_KEY
description: Google Gemini API key for AI workflows.

name: GOOGLE_ADS_DEVELOPER_TOKEN
description: Google Ads API developer token.

name: GOOGLE_ADS_LOGIN_CUSTOMER_ID
description: Google Ads manager account ID for API calls.

name: GOOGLE_ADS_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID
description: OAuth client ID used for Google Ads integration.

name: GOOGLE_ADS_OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET
description: OAuth client secret used for Google Ads integration.

name: GOOGLE_ADS_TEST_CUSTOMER_ID
description: Sandbox customer ID for Google Ads API testing.

name: INTERNAL_JWT_SECRET
description: HMAC secret for issuing internal JWT tokens.

name: INTERNAL_SERVICE_TOKEN
description: Shared bearer token for inter-service authentication.

name: NEXTAUTH_SECRET
description: Shared secret used by NextAuth for session encryption.

name: NEXTAUTH_URL
description: Canonical application URL used by NextAuth callbacks.

name: NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL
description: API Gateway base URL exposed to the frontend.

name: NEXT_PUBLIC_DOMAIN
description: Primary domain for static/site configuration (legacy build args).
notes: 如使用新的 NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL + DOMAIN，可留空。

name: NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL
description: Site base URL exposed to Next.js (differs for preview/production).
notes: 在 Cloud Build 中通过 build arg 提供；Secret 名称备用，若未创建请补充。

name: NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
description: Public Supabase anon key for client-side operations.

name: NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL
description: Supabase project URL exposed to the frontend.

name: OAUTH_STATE_SECRET
description: HMAC secret for AdsCenter OAuth state validation.

name: PROXY_URLS
description: List of proxy endpoints for scraping tasks.

name: Proxy_URL_US
description: Legacy single proxy endpoint for US traffic.
notes: 建议使用 PROXY_URLS；保留用于兼容。

name: READ_REPLICA_URL
description: Optional PostgreSQL read replica connection string.
notes: 未启用读写分离时可留空。

name: REDIS_URL
description: Primary Redis / Memorystore endpoint used for caching and rate limiting.

name: REFRESH_TOKEN_ENC_KEY_B64
description: Base64-encoded AES-GCM key for encrypting Google Ads refresh tokens.

name: SIMILARWEB_BASE_URL
description: Base URL for Similarweb API requests.
notes: 通常为 https://data.similarweb.com/api/v1/data，可根据供应商配置调整。

name: STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY
description: Stripe publishable key for checkout flows.

name: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY
description: Stripe secret key used by backend services.

name: STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET_PREVIEW
description: Stripe webhook signing secret for preview environment.

name: STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET_PRODUCTION
description: Stripe webhook signing secret for production environment.

name: SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN
description: Supabase management API access token.

name: SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY
description: Supabase service role key (bypasses RLS).

name: SUPER_ADMIN_EMAIL
description: Email address with super admin privileges for console.

name: VALKEY_URL
description: Optional Valkey endpoint (drop-in replacement for Redis).
notes: When defined, services prefer VALKEY_URL over REDIS_URL.

name: DB_CONNECTION_MODE
description: Database connection mode for services: direct or cloudsql
notes: Controls database access strategy. Default is 'cloudsql' for Cloud SQL Proxy compliance. Options: direct (direct DB connection), cloudsql (Unix Socket via Cloud SQL Proxy).
